fields.System.Title: Discover and throttle football-data URL ingestion deterministically
fields.System.Description:
# Discover and throttle football-data URL ingestion deterministically

> As a data ingestion maintainer, I want deterministic URL discovery and shared throttled HTTP access, so that football-data ingestion is reproducible and source-friendly.

## Description

Implement regex-driven URL discovery from a whitelist over the football-data source page.

Use one shared throttled HTTP client resource for retrieval with deterministic pacing and deterministic output ordering from discovery.

Enforce explicit fetch policy: historical resources may reuse cache inside a run, while current-season resources are always re-fetched.

## Dependencies

- Parent epic: Story #1.
- Discovery behavior is foundational for both family-specific ingestion tracks.

## Notes

fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given a fixed whitelist and unchanged source page content, when discovery runs repeatedly, then emitted URLs are identical in content and order.
- [ ] Given whitelist filtering, when discovery executes, then only URLs matching approved family/code patterns are emitted.
- [ ] Given sequential outbound requests, when the shared HTTP client is used, then a 0.4 second delay budget is enforced between requests.
- [ ] Given repeated requests for the same non-current file in one run, when cache is enabled, then only one network fetch occurs and cached content is reused.
- [ ] Given current-season files, when ingestion runs, then files are always fetched from source and never served from cache.
- [ ] Given this story artifact, when reviewed, then lineage references are present:
  - [architecture/football-data-ingestion.md](architecture/football-data-ingestion.md)
  - [temp/8c8290a/extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json](temp/8c8290a/extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json)
  - [temp/8c8290a/arch_extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json](temp/8c8290a/arch_extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json)
